v1-warmfeminine.name: Warm Feminine (Production)
v1-warmfeminine.description: Clean food photography, warm tones, salmon pink styling. Default MIRRA look.

product_sku.rules: NEVER swap for AI-generated food. Always use real product photos.

logo.rules: Black serif MIRRA wordmark. Top-right placement. Never distort.

color_palette.rules: Salmon pink dominant. NEVER teal, fuchsia, or neon.

photography.notes: Clean, bright, appetizing. Food should look fresh and real.

lighting.notes: Slightly warm natural light. No heavy shadows.

decorative.notes: Organic blob/cloud shapes are part of brand but should NOT dominate. Use sparingly — max 2-3 small shapes, never competing with product.

color_grading.notes: Warm creamy tones. Vibrant food colors. No film grain. No vintage filter.

mood.notes: Feel-good food — aspirational but not unreachable.

style_rules.blob_vector_limit: Use 0-3 small organic shapes per image. NEVER let blob shapes compete with or obscure the product. Blobs are accent, not feature.
style_rules.food_consistency: For grid/squad ads with multiple products, each product MUST be a different dish. Never repeat the same food.
style_rules.lifestyle_blending: For lifestyle scenes, use angle-view (3/4 perspective) SKU photos, NOT top-view. Top-view is for flat-lay/hero only.
style_rules.comparison_layout: Left = competitor/regular food (slightly less appealing angle). Right = MIRRA product (hero angle, vibrant).

style_override_history.change: Created style-config.json with v1-warmfeminine profile. Added blob limit rule, food dedup rule, lifestyle blending rule.
style_override_history.reason: User feedback: blob shapes overused, foods duplicating in grid, wrong view angle in lifestyle
